detaileddescription.para: Default radial distortion vector size.
Default tangential distortion vector size.
None.
Left World camera.
Right World camera.
Center World camera.
All World cameras.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Enumeration of all the available world camera sensors.
None.
This mode is currently only available when the controller is being tracked.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
None.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration of camera mode used when capturing a frame.

detaileddescription.para: Enumeration of all the available world camera sensors.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration of camera mode used when capturing a frame.
A structure to encapsulate the camera settings.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLWorldCameraSettingsInit before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate per plane info for each camera frame.
A structure to encapsulate output data for each camera sensor.
A structure to encapsulate output data for each camera sensor.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLWorldCameraDataInit before use.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the camera settings structure. Shall be called before calling MLWorldCameraConnect().

parameterdescription.para: Set up the version for inout_world_camera_data.
A pointer to camera handle to be used in later APIs.
One of the parameters is invalid.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

detaileddescription.para: Returns MLWorldCameraData with this latest data when available. The memory is owned by the system. Application should copy the data it needs to cache and release the memory by calling MLWorldCameraReleaseCameraData.
This is a blocking call. API is not thread safe.
If there are no new camera frames within the timeout_ms duration then the API will return MLResult_Timeout.

parameterdescription.para: World camera data. Will be set to NULL if no valid data is available at this time.
Returned because no new frame available at this time.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called exactly once for each successfull call to #MLWorldCameraGetLatestCameraData.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a valid MLWorldCameraData object.

detaileddescription.para: This will disconnect from all the world camera currently connected.
